parameters.jsCode:
const cd = $variables.containerData || {containerName: 'unknown'};
return {system: 'grafana', status: 'pending', dashboardName: cd.containerName + ' Metrics', message: 'Grafana dashboard queued'};

const cd = $variables.containerData || {containerName: 'unknown'};
return {system: 'loki', status: 'pending', jobName: 'docker-' + cd.containerName, message: 'Loki log scrape queued'};
